name: openib-forge
description: Free IB revision platform with notes, practice, flashcards, coursework review, planner, and analytics.

scripts.lint: node --check app.js && node --check netlify/functions/ia-review.js && node --check netlify/functions/ai-tutor.js
scripts.build: node --check app.js && node --check netlify/functions/ia-review.js && node --check netlify/functions/ai-tutor.js
